description: An infographic bar-chart card laid over a faded black-and-white background photo of an industrial factory/warehouse interior. A white panel holds the chart, titled in bold blue text 'Factory Workers' Wages Have Finally Recovered From Biden', with subtitle 'Change in annualized real earnings'. The two-bar chart contrasts a short navy-blue bar labeled '-$830' under 'Real Wages Fall Under Biden' against a tall red bar labeled '+$2,400' (in large red text) under 'Real Wages Soar Under Trump'; the y-axis runs from -$1,500 to $3,000. A footnote reads: 'Note: CEA analysis of BLS data. Weekly wages for non-supervisory manufacturing workers adjusted with CPI-W. Feb. 2026 CPI-W approximated using Bloomberg expectations for CPI-U.'
notable_text: Factory Workers' Wages Have Finally Recovered From Biden; Real Wages Fall Under Biden -$830; Real Wages Soar Under Trump +$2,400
